name: testToggleCompanyInfoVisibilityViaSettings
description: The company info block can be hidden and shown via settings.
descriptionHtml: The company info block can be hidden and shown via settings.

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0909.210533.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: The company info block can be hidden and shown via settings.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Verify: company info block is hidden after selecting 'Hide' in settings
Verify: company info block is visible again after selecting 'Show' in settings
